title: 古风历史题材图
description: Generate avatars of various emperors from the {argument name="dynasty" default="Ming Dynasty"} based on the style of the uploaded image, with their posthumous names and personal names listed below the avatars.
prompt_raw: Generate avatars of various emperors from the {argument name="dynasty" default="Ming Dynasty"} based on the style of the uploaded image, with their posthumous names and personal names listed below the avatars.
prompt_preview: Generate avatars of various emperors from the {argument name="dynasty" default="Ming Dynasty"} based on the style of the uploaded image, with their posthumous names and personal names listed below the avatars.
prompt_display_cn:
案例「dynasty」属于古风历史题材图。这是一条综合视觉案例，需要从原始提示词中提炼画面类型、主体、风格、构图、文字和用途，再转成中文展示版与可填空模板。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：Generate avatars of various emperors from the 【dynasty：Ming Dynasty】 based on the 风格 of the uploaded image, with their posthumous names and personal names listed below the avatars.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【主题】的视觉设计图。

画面主体：
主要表现【主体对象】，突出【核心特征】。

风格与氛围：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】。

构图与背景：
采用【构图方式】，背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【辅助元素】。

文字内容：
如需文字，显示【文字内容】，要求清晰可读，不要乱码。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【使用场景】。
